004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *

012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
021
022import java.nio.charset.*;
023import java.time.*;
024import java.util.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.*;
027
028import com.nimbusds.jose.*;
029import com.nimbusds.jose.crypto.*;
030import com.nimbusds.jwt.*;
031
032/**
033 * Stateless {@link SessionStore} that serializes the session into an HMAC-signed compact JWT carried
034 * entirely in the session cookie.  This is the documented default.
035 *
036 * <p>
037 * Because the session lives client-side, this store scales horizontally and survives server restarts
038 * with no shared store.  The trade-offs:
039 * <ul>
040 *    <li><b>No server-side revocation</b> &mdash; {@link #supportsServerSideRevocation()} is
041 *       <jk>false</jk>; a stateless cookie cannot be force-revoked, so this store does NOT support
042 *       back-channel logout.  Use {@link InMemorySessionStore} or a caller-supplied distributed store
043 *       if back-channel logout is required.
044 *    <li><b>Size cap</b> &mdash; cookies are capped (~4&nbsp;KB); only minimal claims are stored, never
045 *       the raw access / refresh / ID tokens.  An over-cap payload throws rather than silently truncating.
046 *    <li><b>Key rotation</b> &mdash; rotating the signing key invalidates all live sessions (users are
047 *       bounced to re-login).
048 * </ul>
049 *
050 * <p>
051 * The payload is signed with {@code HS256} using the configured signing key (which must be at least 256
052 * bits / 32 bytes).  Signature failures, expiry, and parse errors all resolve to
053 * {@link Optional#empty()} on {@link #lookup(String)} (fail-closed).
054 *
055 * @since 10.0.0
056 */
057@SuppressWarnings({
058   "java:S1192" // Duplicate string literals are cookie attribute names and session field names; intentional
059})
060public class SignedCookieSessionStore implements SessionStore {
061
062   /** Default maximum serialized cookie size in bytes. */
063   public static final int DEFAULT_MAX_COOKIE_BYTES = 4096;
064
065   private static final String CLAIM_NAME = "n";
066   private static final String CLAIM_ROLES = "r";
067   private static final String CLAIM_SID = "sid";
068   private static final String CLAIM_CLAIMS = "c";
069
070   /**
071    * Static creator.
072    *
073    * @return A new builder.
074    */
075   public static Builder create() {
076      return new Builder();
077   }
078
079   /**
080    * Builder.
081    */
082   public static class Builder {
083      private byte[] signingKey;
084      private int maxCookieBytes = DEFAULT_MAX_COOKIE_BYTES;
085      private Clock clock = Clock.systemUTC();
086
087      /** Constructor. */
088      protected Builder() {}
089
090      /**
091       * Sets the HMAC signing key from a string (UTF-8 encoded).  Required.
092       *
093       * @param value The signing key.  Must be at least 32 bytes (256 bits) when UTF-8 encoded.
094       * @return This object.
095       */
096      public Builder signingKey(String value) {
097         assertArgNotNullOrBlank("value", value);
098         return signingKey(value.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));
099      }
100
101      /**
102       * Sets the HMAC signing key bytes.  Required.
103       *
104       * @param value The signing key.  Must be at least 32 bytes (256 bits).
105       * @return This object.
106       */
107      public Builder signingKey(byte[] value) {
108         assertArgNotNull("value", value);
109         assertArg(value.length >= 32, "signingKey must be at least 32 bytes (256 bits) for HS256; was {0}", value.length);
110         signingKey = value.clone();
111         return this;
112      }
113
114      /**
115       * Sets the maximum serialized cookie size in bytes.
116       *
117       * @param value The cap.  Must be positive.
118       * @return This object.
119       */
120      public Builder maxCookieBytes(int value) {
121         assertArg(value > 0, "maxCookieBytes must be positive (was {0})", value);
122         maxCookieBytes = value;
123         return this;
124      }
125
126      /**
127       * Overrides the clock used for expiry comparisons.  Useful in tests.
128       *
129       * @param value The clock.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
130       * @return This object.
131       */
132      public Builder clock(Clock value) {
133         clock = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
134         return this;
135      }
136
137      /**
138       * Builds the store.
139       *
140       * @return A new {@link SignedCookieSessionStore}.
141       */
142      public SignedCookieSessionStore build() {
143         if (signingKey == null)
144            throw new IllegalStateException("SignedCookieSessionStore requires signingKey(...)");
145         return new SignedCookieSessionStore(this);
146      }
147   }
148
149   private final byte[] signingKey;
150   private final int maxCookieBytes;
151   private final Clock clock;
152
153   /**
154    * Constructor.
155    *
156    * @param b The builder.
157    */
158   protected SignedCookieSessionStore(Builder b) {
159      this.signingKey = b.signingKey;
160      this.maxCookieBytes = b.maxCookieBytes;
161      this.clock = b.clock;
162   }
163
164   @Override /* Overridden from SessionStore */
165   public String createSessionCookieValue(OidcSession session) {
166      assertArgNotNull("session", session);
167      try {
168         var cb = new JWTClaimsSet.Builder()
169            .subject(session.subject())
170            .jwtID(session.id())
171            .issueTime(Date.from(session.createdAt()))
172            .expirationTime(Date.from(session.expiresAt()))
173            .claim(CLAIM_NAME, session.principal().getName())
174            .claim(CLAIM_ROLES, new ArrayList<>(session.roles()))
175            .claim(CLAIM_CLAIMS, session.principal().getClaims());
176         session.sid().ifPresent(sid -> cb.claim(CLAIM_SID, sid));
177         var jwt = new SignedJWT(new JWSHeader(JWSAlgorithm.HS256), cb.build());
178         jwt.sign(new MACSigner(signingKey));
179         var serialized = jwt.serialize();
180         if (serialized.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8).length > maxCookieBytes)
181            throw new IllegalStateException("Signed session cookie exceeds maxCookieBytes (" + maxCookieBytes
182               + "); reduce the claim set or switch to a server-side SessionStore.");
183         return serialized;
184      } catch (JOSEException e) {
185         throw new IllegalStateException("Failed to sign session cookie", e);
186      }
187   }
188
189   @Override /* Overridden from SessionStore */
190   @SuppressWarnings({
191      "unchecked" // Type erasure on reflective/generic cast; element type is verified at call site
192   })
193   public Optional<OidcSession> lookup(String cookieValue) {
194      assertArgNotNull("cookieValue", cookieValue);
195      try {
196         var jwt = SignedJWT.parse(cookieValue);
197         if (! jwt.verify(new MACVerifier(signingKey)))
198            return opte();
199         var claims = jwt.getJWTClaimsSet();
200         var exp = claims.getExpirationTime();
201         if (exp == null || ! clock.instant().isBefore(exp.toInstant()))
202            return opte();
203         var subject = claims.getSubject();
204         var name = claims.getStringClaim(CLAIM_NAME);
205         if (subject == null || name == null)
206            return opte();
207         var roles = new LinkedHashSet<String>();
208         var rolesClaim = claims.getStringListClaim(CLAIM_ROLES);
209         if (rolesClaim != null)
210            roles.addAll(rolesClaim);
211         Map<String,Object> principalClaims = (Map<String,Object>) claims.getClaim(CLAIM_CLAIMS);
212         var principal = new ClaimsPrincipal(name, principalClaims);
213         var sid = opt(claims.getStringClaim(CLAIM_SID));
214         var createdAt = claims.getIssueTime() != null ? claims.getIssueTime().toInstant() : clock.instant();
215         return opt(new OidcSession(
216            claims.getJWTID(),
217            subject,
218            sid,
219            principal,
220            roles,
221            opte(),
222            createdAt,
223            exp.toInstant()));
224      } catch (java.text.ParseException | JOSEException | RuntimeException e) {
225         return opte();
226      }
227   }
228
229   @Override /* Overridden from SessionStore */
230   public void invalidate(String cookieValue) {
231      // Stateless: nothing to remove server-side.  The caller clears the cookie on the response.
232   }
233
234   @Override /* Overridden from SessionStore */
235   public boolean supportsServerSideRevocation() {
236      return false;
237   }
238}
